title: pouteria ericoides
intro: Pouteria ericoides, also known as the Bitter Apple or Manilkara, is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural laxative and to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Pouteria ericoides include its potential use in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
